data.body: Epic review round3 PASS but critical advisories from my own remediation drift. Fixed: rewrote 0435 (title/What/Files) to make extract-and-run README the PRIMARY mechanism with a new scripts/check_readme_quickstart.sh extractor + probe-rebar.sh retained as complementary smoke (G5/G3/G4/T7); narrowed epic dead-link AC to f088's bounded scope tied to P2 (E1); removed duplicate defect-corrected AC line; noted epic owns aggregate make lint/typecheck/test check (G3); broadened f088 to check inbound cross-doc relative links so 9d81 relocations cannot silently break links (G3/G4); added 6755 depends_on 9d81 (index-first ordering, G4). Corrected stack order: a41f,b55f,319a,e205,eba7,9d81,6755,f088,0435,e866,235a,b5a4. Re-running epic review to re-sign.
